title: Charesia fedtschenkoana
taxonomy: Charesia fedtschenkoana is classified within the family Apocynaceae, which is a large group of flowering plants commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. This family is further divided into several subfamilies, including the Apocynoideae and the Rauvolfioideae. Charesia fedtschenkoana is specifically classified within the subfamily Apocynoideae, which is one of the largest subfamilies within the Apocynaceae family. The Apocynaceae family, in turn, is part of the order Gentianales, which is a larger group of flowering plants that also includes the family Rubiaceae and the family Loganiaceae. This classification reflects the evolutionary relationships between Charesia fedtschenkoana and other flowering plants.
